title: 9 Herbal Creams for Construction Workers to Overcome Muscle Pain Issues
description: Camphora officinarum creams are used to relieve muscle pain due to their analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The main constituents of Camphora officinarum include camphor, eucalyptus oil, and menthol. Camphor is a natural pain reliever that numbs the skin and reduces muscle spasms, while eucalyptus oil helps to reduce inflammation and improve blood circulation. Menthol, on the other hand, cools the skin and helps to relax tense muscles. When applying Camphora officinarum creams...
